name: rhino-gh-mcp
description: Tiered LLM control of Rhino 3D and Grasshopper for parametric design, architectural research, and teaching.
long_description:
Connects an MCP client (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, web UI) to a running Rhino 8 session. Three tool-surface tiers — parameter-only, curated component group, full authority — let you scale from safe student exploration to script-component injection. Requires the companion Grasshopper (.gha) and Rhino (.rhp) plugins, installed via Rhino's Package Manager (search 'rhino-gh-mcp') or by dragging the Yak packages onto Rhino.

First launch installs Python dependencies into the extension directory (~30 seconds, one-time). Python 3.11 or newer must be on your PATH.

policy.title: Control level
policy.description: Tool surface exposed to the LLM. 'parameter' = read + sliders only; 'curated' = adds a configured component allow-list; 'full' = everything including script-component injection.

gh_port.title: Grasshopper bridge port
gh_port.description: Loopback HTTP port the .gha MCP Server component listens on (must match the canvas component).

rhino_port.title: Rhino bridge port
rhino_port.description: Loopback TCP port the .rhp Rhino plugin listens on (must match the plugin).

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Python logging level for the server: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
